pageContent:
# Deposit Rates

Interest rates for Fixed Deposit (FD), Term Deposit, and Money Multiplier Deposit (MMD).
Revised rates effective from 05.06.2026, expressed as percentage per annum (% p.a.).
Applicable for all tenors and periods from 7 days to above 5 years.
Special named products: IND Supreme 2.0 (300 Days) at 6.30%, Ind Green (500 Days) at 6.40%,
Ind Grow (555 Days) at 6.80%, Ind Prosper (777 Days) at 6.75%.

| Period / Tenor of Deposit | Revised Rate (w.e.f. 05.06.2026) (% p.a.) |
|---|---|
| 7 days to 14 days | 2.80 |
| 15 days to 29 days | 2.80 |
| 30 days to 45 days | 3.00 |
| 46 days to 90 days | 3.25 |
| 91 days to 120 days | 3.50 |
| 121 days to 180 days | 3.85 |
| 181 days to less than 9 months | 4.50 |
| 9 months to less than 1 year (Except 300 days) | 4.75 |
| IND Supreme 2.0 (300 Days) | 6.30 |
| 1 year | 6.10 |
| Above 1 year to less than 2 years (Except 500 & 555 days) | 6.20 |
| Ind Green (500 Days) | 6.40 |
| Ind Grow (555 Days) | 6.80 |
| 2 years to less than 3 years (Except 777 days) | 6.15 |
| Ind Prosper (777 Days) | 6.75 |
| 3 years to less than 5 years | 6.05 |
| 5 year | 6.00 |
| Above 5 years | 6.00 |
